description_long: This guard rail consists of five evenly spaced horizontal bars supported by two vertical posts at each end. The structure is constructed from what appears to be black-coated metal tubing, giving it a sleek and industrial appearance. The horizontal rails are parallel and uniformly cylindrical, providing a continuous barrier. The ends of the vertical posts are capped, and the posts extend slightly beyond the top and bottom rails. There are no visible mounting plates or flanges, suggesting the posts are designed to be embedded or anchored directly into the ground. The overall design is minimalistic, functional, and typical for use along urban roads, sidewalks, or parking areas.
description: A black metal guard rail with five horizontal tubular bars and two vertical posts, designed for urban roadside or sidewalk safety. The structure is sleek, minimal, and industrial in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five horizontal rails and both vertical posts, highlighting the full width and spacing of the bars.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with only the end of the vertical post and the thickness of the rails visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying all five horizontal rails and both vertical posts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile with the vertical post and rail thickness.
